Re
F arn P olrrrcAr- P RACTTcES C oMMrs sroN
P.O. Box 807 . 428 J Street o Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 . Fax (916) 322-0886
July 24,2002
Gabriel A. Godinez, Crty Clerk
City of Arvin
200 Campus Drive
Arvin, C493203
Your Request for Informal Assistance
Our File No. I-02-186
Dear Mr. Godinez:
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the provisions of the
Political Reform Act (the "Act").l Since you are not requesting advice on the duties of a
specific public offrcial, we are treating your request as one for informal assistance
pursuant to Regulation 18329(c).'z
QUESTTON
The City of Arvin is holding a special election on August 13,2002, for the office
of mayor. May candidates and committees involved in the special election combine the
semi-annual statement with the first pre-election statement?
CONCLUSION
In connection with an August 13 special election, candidates and committees
involved in the election were required to file the first pre-election campaign statement no
later than July 5. 2002,3 covering the period through hune29,2OO2. Candidates and
cornmittees could have extended the period covered by this statement through June 30,
2002, but still would have been required to file the statement no later than July 5.
1 Government Code Section 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear attttle 2, sections
I 8 I 0 9 - 1 8 997, of the California Code of Regulations.
2 Informal assistance does not provide the requestor with the immunity provided by an opinion or
formal written advice. (Government Code Section 83114; 2 Cal. Code of Regs. Section 18329(c)(3).)
3 The actual filing deadline, July 4, 2002, was an official state holiday. Pursuant to regulation
18116, the deadline rvas extended to July 5, the next regularbusiness day.


File No. I-02-186
Page No. 2
Assuming the candidates and committees did not extend the period covered by
their first pre-election statement through June 30, we recommend that the second pre-
election statement and the semi-annual statement be combined instead. This statement
will cover the period June 30 through luly 27,2002, and will be due no later than
August 1,2002.
FACTS
The City of Arvin is holding a special election on August 13,2002, for the office
of mayor. On July 15,2002, you wrote asking that the first pre-election statement be
combined with the semi-annual statement due on July 31,2002. By telephone on July 16,
2002, u'e informed you that it is not possible to extend the filing deadline for the first pre-
election statement to July 31, and that candidates and committees were required to file a
statement no later than July 5,2002.
ANALYSIS
During an election, candidates and committees involved in the election are
required to file two campaign statements disclosing contributions received and
expenditures made in connection with that election. These pre-election campaign
statements are generally filed 40 days before the election and again 1,2 days before the
election. (Section 84200.8.) Semi-annual statements are filed January 31 and July 31,
respectively. (Section 84200.)
In connection with the City of Arvin's August 13 special election, the frst pre-
election statement covers the period through htne 29,2002,leaving one day, June 30, to
be covered by the semi-annual statement due on July 31,2002.
There is a mechanism in the Act that permits the combining of statements when
an overlapping reporting period occurs, or the filing of the semi-annual statement would
be an additional, unnecessary filing to the two pre-election statements. (Section84205.)
It appears that combining the second pre-election statement with the semi-annual
statement would be appropriate for the city's August 13 special election.
Accordingly, candidates and committees involved in the August 13 election may
combine the semi-annual statement with the second pre-election statement. The deadline
for filing this combined statement is August 1,2002, the date the second pre-election
statement is due, covering the period June 30 through luly 27,2002. A campaign
statement filing schedule that outlines the due dates for filing statements is enclosed for
your convenience.


File No. I-02-186
Page No. 3
If I may be of any further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact me at (366)
21s-3772.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel
Ce^1,-d.,al*r
By:
Carla Wardlow
Division Chief
Technical Assistance Division
Enclosure
